_comment: Golden test set for Lab 4.6. 30 fabricated input/output pairs drawn from the Track 4 synthetic dataset. Add 5 more in the lab exercise.

text: There is a large pothole on Maple Street near the school crosswalk.
label: public_works

text: A stray dog has been wandering my block for three days.
label: animal_services

text: My neighbor has not mowed in months. Grass is over two feet high.
label: code_enforcement

text: The streetlight at 4th and Oak has been out for a week.
label: public_works

text: How do I apply for a building permit for a backyard shed?
label: permits_and_licensing

text: My recycling bin was not picked up this morning.
label: sanitation

text: There is a raccoon in my attic. I can hear it scratching.
label: animal_services

text: The sidewalk in front of my house is cracked and lifted by tree roots.
label: public_works

text: Construction is starting at 5am every weekday on my block.
label: code_enforcement

text: My water bill jumped from $40 to $310 with no change in usage.
label: utilities_billing

text: What are the public library hours on holidays this year?
label: general_info

text: I need help understanding the rental assistance program.
label: human_services

text: There is a dead deer on the side of the highway near mile marker 12.
label: public_works

text: Someone is running a daycare out of their home with too many kids.
label: code_enforcement

text: How do I renew my pet license?
label: animal_services

text: My block has not had trash pickup for two weeks.
label: sanitation

text: I want to apply for a food assistance program for my family.
label: human_services

text: The traffic signal at Pine and 7th is stuck on red in all directions.
label: public_works

text: Can someone tell me where to vote? I just moved.
label: general_info

text: Coyotes are coming into my backyard at dusk.
label: animal_services

text: I need to schedule a building inspection for the new electrical panel.
label: permits_and_licensing

text: Why was my water shut off without warning? I paid the bill last week.
label: utilities_billing

text: Can I get a copy of the city council minutes from last month?
label: general_info

text: My elderly mother needs the meal delivery program.
label: human_services

text: There is graffiti on the playground equipment at the park.
label: public_works

text: My neighbor's barking dog goes off every night from 11pm to 2am.
label: animal_services

text: An abandoned car has been parked in front of my house for over 30 days.
label: code_enforcement

text: I want to start a small food truck business. What permits do I need?

text: My family qualifies for low-income utility assistance. How do I apply?
